overview.zh: XCF浮选机是一种高效率的充气式浮选设备，采用先进的叶轮-定子系统设计，通过强制循环和射流充气，实现了矿浆与空气的高效混合与矿化。该设备具有充气量大、矿化率高、能耗低等特点，适用于各类金属矿石和非金属矿物的浮选分选。其独特的结构设计和优化的流体动力学性能，使其在提高回收率和精矿品位方面具有明显优势，是现代选矿厂的理想选择。
overview.en: The XCF Flotation Machine is a high-efficiency pneumatic flotation equipment that adopts an advanced impeller-stator system design, achieving efficient mixing and mineralization of slurry and air through forced circulation and jet aeration. This equipment features large air volume, high mineralization rate, and low energy consumption, suitable for flotation separation of various metal ores and non-metallic minerals. Its unique structural design and optimized fluid dynamics performance give it significant advantages in improving recovery rate and concentrate grade, making it an ideal choice for modern mineral processing plants.

note.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
note.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

zh: 专利叶轮-定子系统设计，提高了空气分散效果和矿化率
强制循环技术实现矿浆高效流动，避免死区和短路现象
射流充气系统产生大量细微均匀气泡，增强矿物与气泡的黏附
能耗低，处理能力大，运行成本经济
自动化程度高，易于集中控制和远程操作
结构设计合理，维修方便，使用寿命长
en: Patented impeller-stator system design improves air dispersion effect and mineralization rate
Forced circulation technology achieves efficient slurry flow, avoiding dead zones and short-circuit phenomena
Jet aeration system produces a large number of fine uniform bubbles, enhancing adhesion between minerals and bubbles
Low energy consumption, large processing capacity, economical operating costs
High degree of automation, easy for centralized control and remote operation
Reasonable structural design, convenient maintenance, long service life

description.zh: 广泛应用于铜、铅、锌、镍等有色金属矿物的浮选分离
description.en: Widely used in flotation separation of non-ferrous metal minerals such as copper, lead, zinc, and nickel

description.zh: 适用于铁、锰等黑色金属矿物的浮选工艺
description.en: Suitable for flotation processes of ferrous metal minerals such as iron and manganese

description.zh: 适合萤石、长石、石墨等非金属矿物的浮选提纯
description.en: Suitable for flotation purification of non-metallic minerals such as fluorite, feldspar, and graphite

description.zh: 特别适合大型选矿厂使用，可连续高效处理大量矿石
description.en: Especially suitable for large-scale processing plants, capable of continuously and efficiently processing large quantities of ore
